title: Alpha
description: §01 Core Ideas 4 & 5 tightened — body copy trimmed to match the declarative cadence of the existing three cards.
highlights: New three-level model: Intent (outcome goal) → Cycle (one flag, one gate sequence) → Iteration (one implementation pass)
Intent lifecycle extended: open → in-progress → monitoring → completed; monitoring state explicitly separates flag go-live from outcome confirmation
Gate 2 is now a loop — Guardian presents report, human can approve or request another iteration with written feedback; new iteration spawned with trigger: gate-2-feedback
Gate 3 closes the cycle, not the intent — intent enters monitoring state after flag flip
Gate 1 has two modes: first cycle (approve intent + scope) vs. subsequent cycles (scope only)
Intent Log and Iteration Record gain clearer responsibilities to support multi-cycle intent tracking
Intent Completion added as a first-class signal event — explicit PO declaration that the outcome signal was observed
Core idea 4: Iterate to the signal — trimmed to 4 declarative sentences; vehicle analogy removed
Core idea 5: Zero block — trimmed to 5 declarative sentences; Dependency Broker reference removed (belongs in §11/§14)
